name: A Big Brother's Fight
description: "The brothers' feud can finally come to an end. Find a Red Pollen Orb that Zukazu can eat to assure his victory."
walkthrough:
"Collect a Red Pollen Orb from a location relating to the Nopon."
Hint: It can be found in the Nopon Refuge at Satorl Marsh.
"Return to Zukazu."
results: "Zukazu has emerged victorious from the feud with his brother and he leaves Colony 9 to travel."

name: A Curry Conundrum
description: The Curry Shop, well known for its tasty curries, is running out of ingredients! Help Giorgio by collecting the required ingredients.
walkthrough:
"Collect 5 Dance Apples from Colony 9."
Hint: Trade with Rosemary (☆1)
"Return to Giorgio."
uniqueComments:
: 'Reyn': ''"But you can't stop making it! I'd die if I couldn't eat your curry! Plus, you don't charge extra for a bigger helping."''
: 'Giorgio': "You... You really like my curry? Well, thanks, mate!"
results:
"The Colony 9 Curry Shop can make its famous curries once again!"
clr
trivia:
This quest is referenced by Shulk and Georgie in XC3FR. After ''Georgie's Ask'', Georgie tells Shulk that Giorgio, who is her grandfather, said that Shulk went to fetch him some missing ingredients one time, and that practically saved his reputation. Shulk then recalls that he brought him some Dance Apples.
Category:Colony 9 Quests

name: A Little Brother's Fight
description: ''The brothers' feud will finally come to an end. Find a Red Pollen Orb for Jiroque and stop Zukazu from leaving to travel around Bionis.''
walkthrough:
"Collect a Red Pollen Orb from a location relating to the Nopon."
Hint: It can be found in the Nopon Refuge at Satorl Marsh.
"Return to Jiroque."
results: Jiroque and Zukazu resolve their feud and live in Colony 9 happily together.

name: A Mysterious Light
rewards: Bloody Roar (Unique) (A route) or Auto-Atk Stealth II (B route)
description: "The mysterious light that appeared in the lake after the attack has disappeared and the residents miss it. Discover the mystery behind this light."
walkthrough:
"Collect information from Colony residents."
At this point, there are two different routes, but only one can be chosen.
'A Route'
"Talk to Arnaut."
"Talk to Narine."
"Talk to Arnaut again."
"Report to Kenny Rohan."
'B Route'
"Talk to Suzanna."
"Talk to Françoise."
"Talk to Dionysis."
"Report to Kenny Rohan."
uniqueComments:
: 'Shulk': "It does sound like a really interesting mystery!"
: 'Kenny Rohan': "Well said, boy. You have great potential."
Category:Colony 9 Quests
results:
'A route:' "The mysterious light was in fact an ether lamp tangled up in some fallen debris."
'B route:' "Contrary to all the wild rumours, the mysterious light was really just an ether lamp."

name: A Place to Come Home to
description: "Jiroque wants to get a room ready for when Zukazu returns. Help him make a room fit for a Nopon."
walkthrough:
"Collect 3 Quality Antol Jaws from Clinger Antols in Colony 9."
"Collect 4 Black Irises in Makna Forest."
"Collect 2 Forget-You-Nots in Satorl Marsh."
uniqueComments:
: 'Riki': "Leave it to Riki! Riki make it best room ever!"
: 'Jiroque': ''"It's good to have a Nopon on board. I know my brother'd love it if you could help."''
Category:Colony 9 Quests
Category:XC Mutually Exclusive Quests
results: ''"Zukazu's room is all ready! There won't be a single speck of dust when he returns."''

name: A Token of Friendship

prerequisites.label: Shulk in the lead inspecting the area when a prompt appears

description: "Shulk is finally back in the lab. He would like to make a weapon for Reyn. He should be able to make a great weapon with his experience and knowledge."
walkthrough:
"Collect 3 Gogol Horns."
Hint: LV76 Sloth Gogols at Bionis' Leg
"Collect 3 Thick Rhana Hides."
Hint: LV87 Eryth Rhanas at Eryth Sea or the LV73 Vicious Rhanas from Getting to Know Minnie
"Collect 3 Aged Chilkin Hairs."
Hint: LV42 Poleaxe Chilkins at Valak Mountain
"Return to the Weapon Development Lab."
results:
"Shulk put all his effort into making the best possible weapon for Reyn."
Category:Colony 9 Quests

name: A Young Captain's Challenge

prerequisites.label: Kantz registered on the Affinity Chart

description: "The lieutenant colonel qualification test is about to start! It's not looking good for Emmy Leater though... Help her out! She needs a sword or a shield."
walkthrough:
Give her either a Nopon Claymore or a Carbo Shield; only one can be chosen.
'Nopon Claymore route (A route)':
"Talk to the Nopon Merchant at Sororal Statues in Satorl Marsh."
Note: After the events at Mechonis Core, he will move to the Nopon Merchant Camp, but the objective detail does not change.
"Collect 4 pieces of Bunnia Scent Wood."
Hint: Trade with Bokoko (☆1) at the Nopon Merchant Camp
"Return to the Nopon Merchant to receive the Nopon Claymore."
"Return to Emmy Leater."
'Carbo Shield route (B route)':
"Find a Carbo Shield."
Hint: Storage area north of the Colony 6 main entrance.
"Return to Emmy Leater."
results:
The results will change depending on which route was chosen:
:'Nopon Claymore route:' "She takes the test, but wins in a dishonourable fashion."
:'Carbo Shield route:' "Holding the Carbo Shield, she takes the test, but fails miserably."

name: A Young Captain's Request
description: "Young Captain Emmy Leater is getting really angry with her subordinate. Go and find that lazybones called Miller."
walkthrough:
"Find Miller somewhere in the Commercial District."
Hint: Miller (09:00 - 15:00) can found near the building at the northernmost area of Commercial District. Follow the passage to the left of the Gem Man's Stall to reach the area. Jump down to the lower level and search carefully for Miller.
"Return to Emmy Leater."
uniqueComments:
: 'Reyn': ''"Good to see our young captain hasn't changed!"''
: 'Emmy Leater': "Reyn! You look like you need some work! Surely you can help me out."
: 'Reyn': "You asking for help again?! You have to do this stuff yourself sometimes."
: 'Emmy Leater': ''"I know, but you know how fast Miller can run, don't you? He can get away from me in three seconds. I need your help."''
Category:Colony 9 Quests
results: ''"This recent incident has made Miller turn over a new leaf. Hopefully he's learnt his lesson."''

name: A Young Captain's Revival
description: "Kantz suspects the sword had poison on it. Find out the truth and clear Emmy Leater's name."
walkthrough:
"Collect 4 Poisonous Gourds from Satorl Marsh."
Hint: They are readily found in Poison Swamp or Dark Swamp
''"Listen to Emmy Leater's side of the story."''
Hint: Emmy Leater is at the northern area of the Military District from 9:00 - 12:00
''"Listen to Kantz's side of the story."''
Hint: Kantz is nearby, at the northern gate of the Military District from 9:00 - 15:00
''"Listen to the results of Raoul's investigation of the poison-tipped sword."''
Hint: Raoul is at the entrance of the Military District from 9:00 - 12:00
"Return to Miller."
The party will subsequently be asked about their opinion on the identity of the perpetrator behind the incident that occurred during the battle between Emmy Leater and Kantz. The answer chosen will not affect the outcome of the quest, but the correct answer is Kantz.
results: ''"Emmy Leater's name has been cleared and she can resume her duties in the Defence Force."''

name: A Young Captain's Rise
description: "Strange monsters have appeared in Tephra Cave and the Young Captain Emmy Leater needs help eliminating them."
walkthrough:
"Defeat either the unknown monster at the Spring of Grief or Vilia Lake in Tephra Cave."
'A route:' Lurker Brog at the Spring of Grief.
'B route:' Lurker Krabble at Vilia Lake.
"Return to Emmy Leater."
Note: After defeating one of the two monsters, the other will disappear.
uniqueComments:
: 'Reyn': ''"I can't really refuse this time. But are you sure you can handle the other one?"''
: 'Emmy Leater': "Give me a break. Of course! And Miller will be there as well. So, will you really help me?"
Category:Colony 9 Quests
results:
'A route:' "You defeated the Lurker Brog to help out Emmy get a little closer to achieving her dream."
'B route:' "You defeated the Lurker Krabble to help out Emmy get a little closer to achieving her dream."

name: A Young Captain's Suffering

prerequisites.label: Raoul registered on the Affinity Chart

description: "Young Captain Emmy Leater has hit another wall. She really needs some help with a seek and exterminate mission in Tephra Cave."
walkthrough:
"Defeat 5 Wind Vangs in Tephra Cave."
"Return to Emmy Leater."
uniqueComments:
: 'Reyn': "Here we are again! And let me guess. You have to take all the credit for our work."
: 'Emmy Leater': ''"I'll make sure everyone knows you helped us. But if you're still not happy... I know. I'll buy you dinner. You can stuff yourself with all your favourite foods."''
: 'Reyn': ''"Now that's what I'm talkin' about!"''
results: ''"You really helped Emmy Leater out. She'll be entrusted with more missions from now on."''

name: A Young Captain's Trust
description: "Emmy Leater has run off in total despair. Find her and give her the message from the Defence Force soldiers of Colony 9."
walkthrough:
"Find Emmy Leater and give her the letter."
Hint: Emmy Leater is at the Mining Base of the Ether Mine
results:
"The Young Captain is moved and returns to the Colony 9 Defence Force."
clr

name: An Impoverished Critic

prerequisites.label: Sylviane registered in the Colony 9 area Affinity Chart

description: In a vision, Leopold is being harassed for money by the loan shark King Squeeze. Do something to prevent this unhappy occurrence.
walkthrough:
"Meet King Squeeze and object to his harsh collection methods."
"Investigate what King Squeeze and Sylviane are up to, or tell Leopold the facts."
Financial Planning will be forcefully accepted and only one of the two routes can be chosen.
results: ''"The worst possible outcome has been prevented. Let's hope they turn over a new leaf."''

name: Betty's Gift
description: "Betty wants to give Désirée a cute piece of armour to congratulate her on her new job. Collect the materials she needs to make it."
walkthrough:
"Collect 2 Lucky Skeeter Wings from Chordy Skeeters in Colony 9."
Hint: Trade with Nic (☆3)
"Collect 2 Vang Hair Clips from Shadow Vangs in Colony 9."
Hint: Trade with Rosemary (☆4)
"Collect 4 Razor Teasels at Eryth Sea."
Hint: Trade with Ruthan (☆1) from Alcamoth.
"Return to Betty."
uniqueComments:
: 'Sharla': "I thought about doing that once so I know exactly what you mean. We should support the people who are working so hard on our behalf."
: 'Betty': ''"I can't agree more. I'm glad you understand. So you'll help me?"''
Category:Colony 9 Quests
Category:XC Mutually Exclusive Quests
results: "With her new present, Désirée is sure to enjoy her work with the Defence Force even more!"

name: Birthday Shoes
description: Kantz would like to make some leather shoes for his son's birthday, but has no time to get the materials. Collect the materials he needs to make the shoes.
walkthrough:
"Collect 2 Azure Flamii Wings from Opulent Flamii in Colony 9."
: Opulent Flamii are located on the unnamed shore north of Anti-Air Battery 2
"Return to Kantz."
uniqueComments:
: 'Dunban': "Shoes this year, is it? You are always so good to that boy."
: 'Kantz': ''"There isn't a father in the world who doesn't dote on his son. Surely you, who cares dearly for your younger sister, understand?"''
Category:Colony 9 Quests
results:
"Kantz has the materials he needs, and will now be able to make a fine pair of shoes for his son."
clr

description: Take Marcia's biscuits to her grandson, Jiroque. Jiroque is in the residential district, training to win a fight with his older brother.
walkthrough:
''"Take Marcia's Biscuits to Jiroque."''
Hint: Jiroque is at the southern part of Tranquil Square from 18:00 to 03:00. He can be seen punching a tree.
"Return to Marcia."
uniqueComments:
: 'Fiora': ''"Why do you want the younger one to win? They're both family."''
: 'Marcia': ''"Oh, that's right, Fiora... You wouldn't know. Anyway, that's our business. I shouldn't have said anything."''
es:Galletas para un nieto
Category:Colony 9 Quests
results: ''"Jiroque has his grandmother's biscuits. What will happen when he fights his brother...?"''

walkthrough:

results:
"The Colony 9 residents are very grateful that the terrifying situation has come to an end."

"The curiosity of the Defence Force Soldier has been satisfied."

Category:Colony 9 Quests
results: "With the children no longer squabbling, Sonia was able to make dinner for Dean."

Find Shulk and give him the food.

''"Challenge yourself to listen to Désirée's long and boring story."''
''"Try not to fall asleep while listening to Désirée's story."''

"Désirée will become a sculptor"
results:

description: "Collect the Friendship Tokens said to symbolise eternal friendship and give them to the children."

"Collect 4 Arachno Sickles from Arachnos in Tephra Cave."

description: "You meet with Dorothy but she makes a request of you. You decide to collect the fruit she has asked for anyway."

"Collect 5 Heart Peaches in Alcamoth."
"Return to Dorothy."
uniqueComments:
: 'Melia': ''"Don't you feel ashamed for making such selfish requests of others?"''
: 'Dorothy': ''"Well excuse me, princess! Sorry, but I don't find all that too convincing coming from you."''

: 'Dorothy': "So, are you going to get me my Heart Peaches?"
Category:Colony 9 Quests
results: "Having met with Dorothy, you feel that she is a person who empathises with the plight of others."

description: "Monsters have appeared under the bridge connecting the Central Plaza with the Residential District in Colony 9. Defeat them for Minnie."

"Defeat 5 LV73 Vicious Rhanas near the Residential District of Colony 9."

"Return to Minnie."
uniqueComments:
: 'Shulk': ''"They're right below where we all live. We can't leave it there."''
: 'Minnie': ''"Right. I dunno why they can't just find some other place to live."''
Category:Colony 9 Quests
results: ''"Having met with Minnie, you feel that she is a person who would put the colony's safety first."''

name: Jackson the Cook
description: "Jackson has a new recipe for the Curry Shop but they don't have the right ingredients in stock. Collect the ingredients Jackson asks for."

"Collect 5 lots of Raw Piranhax Meat from Colony Piranhax in Colony 9."
Hint: Trade with Arnaut (☆2)
"Return to Jackson."

: 'Dunban': ''"Life's hard for everyone. You're not the only one struggling."''

Category:XC Mutually Exclusive Quests
results: ''"The new recipe is delicious but it's unsuitable for regular production so it won't be on the menu!"''

Category:XC Mutually Exclusive Quests

"Talk to Kenny Rohan."

"Return to Jackson."

"Return to Niranira."

: 'Reyn': ''"I'm really worried. Although if things turn nasty, you can always jump into the lake."''
: 'Defence Force Soldier': ''"But that's also pretty scary. Reyn, how about it? Won't ya help out a Defence Force buddy?"''
Category:Tephra Cave Quests
results: "The missing soldier has been accounted for, alive and well!"

name: The Blood of Bafalgar
description: "According to the Starlight Book, an offering must be made in order to open the door. Collect the White Spider Heart and offer it up at the altar."
walkthrough:
"Defeat Dazzling Tolosnia near the Heavenly Window and collect the White Spider Heart."
Dazzling Tolosnia is level 97, and can be found at the dead-end southwest of Heavenly Window
"Offer up the White Spider Heart at the Bafalgar Tomb altar."
"Return to Shura."
uniqueComments:
: 'Riki': "Yucky yuck yuck! Riki no want to eat that!"
: 'Shura': ''"We won't be eating it so don't worry, you cute little thing!"''
: 'Riki': "Riki no cute little thing! Riki big! Riki have 11 littlepon!"
: 'Shura': "Oh, you must be older than me. My apologies."
Category:Tephra Cave Quests
results: "Offering up the White Spider Heart opened the door. Time to head inside."

name: The Book of Bafalgar
description: "Shura has come to investigate Giants' ruins, but hasn't made much progress alone. Retrieve a book containing a hint on how to open Bafalgar Tomb."
walkthrough:
"Find the Starlight Book near Vilia Lake in Tephra Cave."
Hint: Upper floor of Vilia Lake; northeast area; heading south from the Bafalgar Tomb to get there.
"Return to Shura."
uniqueComments:
: 'Shulk': "Er, we never actually agreed to..."
: 'Shura': "Oh? Are you not interested?"
: 'Shulk': ''"No, it's not that we're not interested, but..."''
Category:Tephra Cave Quests
results: "You found the Starlight Book! Opening the hidden door should now be possible."

name: The Coffin of Bafalgar
description: "The investigation of Bafalgar Tomb is almost over. With the hidden door now open, locate a critical hint from the Soothsayer's Crypt."
walkthrough:
''"Find the hint in the Soothsayer's Crypt in Tephra Cave."''
The Moonlight Book appears at night, near the illuminated tomb, inside the Soothsayer's Crypt found by looking for the Obsidian Door on the wall near the stairway.
"Return to Shura."
results:
"You gave the Moonlight Book to Shura. With both books it should be possible to investigate further."
Category:Tephra Cave Quests

name: The Gratitude of Bafalgar
description: "You didn't receive your reward for assisting Shura in her investigation of Bafalgar Tomb. Make your way to Colony 9 to claim your prize."
walkthrough:
"Speak to Shura in the Colony 9 Commercial District."
Hint: At 18:00 Shura leaves a house in the northeast corner of the Commercial District. She arrives at Giorgio's Curry Shop slightly before 19:00 and remains there until 3am. She then returns to the same house, arriving slightly before 04:00.
results:
"To thank you for your help at Bafalgar Tomb, Shura has presented a family heirloom."
clr

name: The Path of Bafalgar
description: "Despite the door now being open, Shura isn't keen on going inside. Head in and take a look around the Prayer Room in Bafalgar Tomb."
walkthrough:
"Enter and search the Prayer Room in Bafalgar Tomb."
Hint: The room is behind the altar. By inspecting the Prayer Room, the Inscription Rubbing Key Item can be obtained.
"Return to Shura."
"Collect the Sacrificial Tablet from near the Path of Absolution in Tephra Cave."
Hint: There is a hidden passage in the area southwest of Heavenly Window. The passage will lead to the Path of Absolution.
"Return to Shura."
results:
"Nothing special was found inside but more doors can now be opened."
Category:Tephra Cave Quests

name: A Dash of Colour
description: "Matryona is the inspiration that set Ewan on his path to writing the story. Collect the Sour Gooseberries he needs to make paints for Matryona's pictures."
walkthrough:
''"Collect 4 Sour Gooseberries in Bionis' Leg."''
Hint: Trade with Kiroki (☆1)
"Report back to Ewan."
"Give the paints to Matryona."
"Return to Ewan."
uniqueComments:
: 'Sharla': "You need to stop being so hard on yourself, Ewan. Not a single person here hates you for the decision you took."
: 'Ewan': ''"Hearing that from you makes all the difference, Sharla. Maybe it is time to move on... But I'm feeling more positive now. I once again feel the desire to put quill to paper! I've written a few lines since Matryona gave me an idea. Things are a little...awkward between us, but it's getting better. Which brings me to the favour I need to ask you."''
Category:Bionis' Leg Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests
results: ''"Thanks to Ewan's newly-found drive, he and Matryona's relationship is much improved."''

name: A Flower for a Rose
description: "Collect a single blossoming flower for Dulland from the Tephra Cave ruins."
walkthrough:
"Collect 1 Ancient Lily near Bafalgar Tomb in Tephra Cave."
Hint: By entering the room behind the altar at Bafalgar Tomb and proceeding to the end of the passage, the flower will be found.
"Return to Dulland."
uniqueComments:
: 'Fiora': "Are you going to give it as a gift to someone special?"
: 'Dulland': "I should be so lucky. Not at my age..."
: 'Fiora': "So why would you want it?"
Category:Bionis' Leg Quests
results: "The Ancient Lily has been delivered to Dulland, but who will be the final recipient?"

name: A Thoughtful Idea
description: "Pama is feeling the pain of losing his parents. To bring a smile back to his face, pay Ewan the author a visit and speak to him about making a picture book."
walkthrough:
"Speak to Ewan."
''"Collect 3 pieces of Ponio Neck Meat from Field Ponios in Bionis' Leg.''
Hint: level 12 Niece Ponios and level 15 Field Ponios drop Ponio Neck Meat.
"Speak to Ewan."
"Return to Matryona."
uniqueComments:
: 'Reyn': ''"I won't lie by saying I understand what the kid's going through. But it just ain't right when a little kid is as sad as he is."''
: 'Matryona': "I agree. Pama and everyone else."
: 'Reyn': ''"Then you're looking at the best people for the job! We of all people know what its like to have a home demolished."''
Category:Bionis' Leg Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests
results: "With a distinct air of positivity, Ewan has begun work putting the picture book together."

name: Battling Brutes
description: "Dulland can't make his Ancient Lily delivery as planned. Head to Tephra Cave and defeat the two large monsters fighting each other."
walkthrough:
''"Defeat LV98 Reckless Zanden at the Arachno Queen's Nest in Tephra Cave."''
Zanden emits an important range spike.
''"Defeat LV98 Firework Geldesia at the Arachno Queen's Nest in Tephra Cave."''
Geldesia has an important counter Daze spike.
"Return to Dulland."
results: "The monsters in Tephra Cave have been eliminated to ensure safe passage to Colony 9."

name: Being a Good Grandfather

prerequisites.label: Nikita registered on the Colony 6 area Affinity Chart

description: "Satata's grandson has broken a toy belonging to his friend. To fix it, Satata needs some Sticky Web Fibres. Collect some to help Satata fix the toy."
walkthrough:
''"Collect 3 Sticky Web Fibre from Arachno on the Bionis' Leg."''
Hint: Overtraded by Anna (550+ G) at Refugee Camp or trade with Emmy Leater (☆2) at Colony 9
"Return to Satata."
"Give the toy to Kiroki."
"Return to Satata."
uniqueComments:
: 'Sharla': ''"Sticky fibres make good glue... That's a brilliant idea, Satata! Leave it with me and I'll make sure you get the fibres you need. It's my job to look after everybody, after all."''
: 'Satata': "So friends will help me? Thank you, Sharla."
Category:Bionis' Leg Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests
results: "Now that the toy has been repaired, the two friends have made up."

results:
"Quest completed. You have taken care of the monster. The inhabitants of the camp are safe."
Category:Bionis' Leg Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests

results:
"Quest completed. The rampaging monster is no longer a threat."
Category:Bionis' Leg Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests

description: "A monster has overrun an area where people forage for much-needed provisions. Defeat the monster and reclaim this cherished area."

Hint: High hills east of Zax Guidepost. It commands two Berserk Arduns
results:
"Quest completed. The area has been freed from this monster and is safe to visit again."
Category:Bionis' Leg Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests

description: "A noticeably larger-than-usual Tirkin has been spotted. He'll need to be taken care of before he sets his sights on the camp. Defeat him."

results:
"Quest completed. The threat posed by the large Tirkin is no more."

Category:XC Timed Quests

name: Collection Quest 1
description: "Food at the camp leaves a lot to be desired. If more flavour can be added to the food, things will get a lot better. Find the collectables required to do this."
walkthrough:

Hint: Trade with Ewan (☆1)
results:
"Quest completed. Food should be a lot more flavoursome from now on."
Category:Bionis' Leg Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests

name: Collection Quest 2
description: "A little girl wants nothing more than some pet insects to call her own. Make her day by finding some collectables."
walkthrough:
''"Collect 3 Moth Crawlers on the Bionis' Leg.''
Hint: Trade with Satata (☆1)
results:
"Quest completed. She should be a little happier now she has some new friends to play with."
Category:Bionis' Leg Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests

name: Earnest's Fibs
description: "Apparently there is an everlasting ether deposit very close by. Leave the camp, head right and into a small cave where it is supposedly concealed."
walkthrough:
"Search the area around the ether deposit."
It is inside Kisk Cave, farthest south of Viliera Hill. Five Fierce Vangs spawn only during this quest but it is not required to defeat them.
"Return to Earnest."
uniqueComments:
: 'Reyn': ''"You sure you're not having a laugh with us? 'Cos I ain't buyin' it. Sounds too good to be true."''
: 'Earnest': ''"You don't have to believe me. Ain't no skin off my back. It's you who'll be losing out."''
: 'Reyn': ''"Suppose it can't hurt to go take a look. But I smell a rat."''
Category:Bionis' Leg Quests
results: "You found nothing but normal crystals. Looks like Earnest pulled a fast one!"

name: Earnest's Mischief
description: "There is supposedly an endless supply of crystals in a cave on the edge of Raguel Lake, south east of the bridge. Go there and find out if this is really the case."
walkthrough:
"Search the area around the ether deposit."
It is inside Tranquil Grotto, farthest southeast of Raguel Lake. Assault Flamiis spawn only during this quest but it is not required to defeat them.
"Return to Earnest."
uniqueComments:
: 'Shulk': ''"But we all know what happened last time. We just can't trust you. You're really not lying this time?"''
: 'Earnest': ''"I weren't even lyin' before. I just got it wrong before, didn't I? You can trust me."''
: 'Shulk': ''"I'd like to say 'I can' but..."''
: 'Earnest': ''"Well, whateva. I ain't gonna force ya. Do whateva ya like."''
Category:Bionis' Leg Quests
results: "After giving him the benefit of the doubt, it looks like Earnest tricked you... again!"

name: Earnest's Solitude
description: "There seems to be a reason behind Earnest's lies. Place flowers on the grave of his friend at the edge of the cliff north of Kasharpa Waterfall."
walkthrough:
"Place the flowers on the grave."
It is inside northeast corner of upper Bionis' Leg. The level 19 Arrogant Tirkin will immediately appear once the flowers are placed on the grave.
''"Defeat the Arrogant Tirkin to the north of Kasharpa Waterfall on the Bionis' Leg."''
"Return to Earnest."
uniqueComments:
: 'Sharla': ''"I do. I can see it in your eyes. I can't be a hundred percent sure. But it feels like you're telling the truth this time."''
: 'Earnest': ''"Really? Ya believe me? Hmm... What's this? I'm feeling a bit guilty."''
: 'Sharla': ''"Don't be like that. I'm sure you had reasons for lying when you did. But I believe what you're saying now."''
results: "The darkness in Earnest is gone. No more dishonest antics from him!"

name: Emergency Treatment

description: "Gorman took only a limited supply of his medicine in the escape from Colony 6. If it runs out, he'll be in trouble. Collect ingredients for Olga to make more."

Hint: Trade with Ewan (☆1)
"Return to Olga."
uniqueComments:

Category:Bionis' Leg Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests
results: Gorman can sleep now that Olga has the ingredients to make his anti-insomnia medicine.

name: Imaginations Tempered
description: "A glimpse of the future shows Pama drowning! If nothing is done to stop him, he'll surely die. Change the future and don't let Pama drown!"
walkthrough:

"Return to Matryona."
Spirits Raised will disappear after Matryona is given the Lake Drop.
"Give the picture book to Pama."
results: "The picture book has changed and the tragedy of Pama drowning has been averted."

name: Legend of Mythical Empress
description: "The Mythical Empress is on a rampage fuelled by the death of her young and is destroying the area around the nest. Head there and put her out of her misery."
walkthrough:

"Return to Gerugu."
uniqueComments:
: 'Riki': "We not have to do that! She not bad monster! You make mistake!"
: 'Gerugu': "Some evil person kill her child. You went to nest before. But you not hurt her, did you? Gerugu understand she angry cos horrible person take child. You understand too, right?"
: 'Riki': "Riki understand."
Category:Bionis' Leg Quests
results: "The Mythical Empress has fallen and the legend has come to an end."

description: "Occasionally, it would be nice to feed the camp's inhabitants some food that galvanises their spirits. Collect some ingredients that would do the trick."
walkthrough:
''"Collect 2 lots of Brog Leg Meat from Brogs on the Bionis' Leg."''
Hint: Day only. ~LV18 Big Brogs. They can be found in upper Bionis' Leg. One is in the pond west of Spiral Valley. The other can be found in the small island west of Kasharpa Falls
Trade with Zukazu (☆2) at Refugee Camp (must clear ''A Big Brother's Fight'')
''"Collect 2 Fertile Flamii Eggs from Flamii on the Bionis' Leg."''
Hint: Day only. ~LV12 Black Flamiis; the lakes around Jabos Rock Rest Area.
Trade with Zukazu (☆1) at Refugee Camp (must clear ''A Big Brother's Fight'')
results:
''"Quest completed. This should help raise the spirits of the camp's inhabitants a little."''
Category:Bionis' Leg Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests

walkthrough:

Hint: Trade with Gorman (☆1) at the Refugee Camp
results:
"Quest completed. Now the much-needed clothes can be made."

Category:XC Timed Quests

results:
"Quest completed. Hopefully this sapling will help cheer people up."
Category:Bionis' Leg Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests

Trade with Suzanna (☆2) at Colony 9.

''"Quest completed. This should be enough teeth to make amulets and put peoples' minds at ease."''

Category:XC Timed Quests

results:
''"The Homs Traveller is out of harm's way at last. Maybe it was just him being a little too friendly..."''

results:

results:
''"Quest completed. Now there shouldn't be any problem going to see the fireflies."''

Category:XC Timed Quests

Hint: Maguel Road
results:
"Quest completed. The search for survivors should be much easier now."

Category:XC Timed Quests

description: "Man-eating Volff are closing in on a girl while she bathes. Go and rescue her before it's too late!"

"Speak to the girl."
results:
''"The girl who went bathing alone is safe. She won't be coming back here alone any time soon!"''
clr

Category:XC Timed Quests

''"Collect the Torn Paper from Gaur Plain on the Bionis' Leg."''
Hint: Southwest of Gaur Plain. The item is near the end of the land.
results: "Quest completed. The precious gift has been successfully recovered, intact and safe."

name: Spirits Raised
description: "A glimpse of the future shows Pama drowning! It looks like it's going to happen if he goes to the river alone. Don't let Pama go there on his own!"
walkthrough:
''"Collect a Medicinal Herb from near Tranquil Grotto on the Bionis' Leg."''

"Speak to Arda."
"Return to Matryona."
"Give the picture book to Pama."
results: "Arda received the back medicine meaning Pama no longer visits the river on his own."

name: Supplies for Satorl
description: "Some of the evacuated High Entia are holed-up in Satorl Marsh. They are running dangerously low on food. Find them some food to replenish their reserves."
walkthrough:
"Give goods to Scarlen in Satorl Marsh."
Oath Sanctuary (anytime, before Imperial Ceremony Offerings completed), or Sororal Statues (18:00 - 03:00, after Imperial Ceremony Offerings completed).
uniqueComments:
: 'Melia': "Oh my."
: 'Elior': "Did I say something wrong?"
: 'Melia': "Such noble sentiments! What an admirable young man! Meeting you fills my heart with gladness, young sir."
: 'Elior': "You speak really fancy. Who are you?"
: 'Melia': ''"Who am I? Well, I suppose I shouldn't expect you to know that."''
: 'Elior': ''"Hmm... Are you someone important? A famous adventurer? Or maybe an important explorer? I can tell from your face that I'm way way off here..."''
Category:Bionis' Leg Quests
results: "The Satorl refugees have received food from the camp. Life should be a little easier for them now."

name: The Greedy Monster
description: "The residents are finding it difficult to catch fish. They believe a monster that has settled by Raguel Lake is to blame. Defeat the monster."
walkthrough:
''"Defeat the LV16 Abnormal Brog near Raguel Lake on the Bionis' Leg."''
Hint: The central island on Raguel Lake.
"Return to Satata."
uniqueComments:
: 'Sharla': ''"That's not good... I turn my back for one minute and this is what happens! I'm really sorry, Satata."''
: 'Satata': ''"It not your fault, Sharla. No one blames you for not here. You had your reasons and don't let anyone tell you different!"''
: 'Sharla': "It makes me happy to hear that. Right, we really do need to do something about that monster!"
Category:Bionis' Leg Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests
results: "The fish-eating monster that settled by Raguel Lake is gone and a food crisis has been averted."

name: The Lost Nopon
description: "Batubatu went off in search of ingredients for Gerugu and his dinner, but his poor sense of direction got him lost. Find out where he is."
walkthrough:
"Find Batubatu."
Hint: Elevated cliff near an ether deposit at northwest of Raguel Lake.
"Return to Gerugu."
uniqueComments:
: 'Sharla': ''"Do you have any idea where he could've gone?"''
: 'Gerugu': "Gerugu tell him not to go too far. He always get lost. Gerugu think he go very far. He has no sense of direction."
: 'Sharla': ''"He's probably completely lost."''
results: "Batubatu has been found and won’t be heading off alone in future."

name: Thieving Monsters
description: "Tirkins took the refugees' clothes while they were hanging out to dry. If nothing is done, there won't be enough to go around. Find and retrieve the clothes."
walkthrough:
''"Collect the Clothes from the Tirkin Headquarters on the Bionis' Leg."''
Hint: By looking for the cave at the right side of Rho Oasis.
"Return to Gorman."
uniqueComments:
: 'Shulk': "You know who did it? Then why not send out a band of young people to get them?"
: 'Gorman': ''"It's mostly just oldies and children here. There are some young adults here but they're all cowards and weaklings!"''
Category:Bionis' Leg Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests
results: "The stolen clothes have been recovered from the Tirkins."

name: With Even More Gratitude
description: "This time Batubatu has gone to find a flower to give to someone without your help. Unfortunately, he's lost his way and you have to find him again!"
walkthrough:
''"Locate Batubatu on a high place east of Zax Guidepost on the Bionis' Leg."''
Hint: Upper level, northeast of upper Bionis' Leg, by finding the elevated passage that leads to a cave.
''"Head to the top of the large waterfall on the Bionis' Leg and collect the Ether Wisdom."''
Hint: Believer's Paradise. The passage that leads to the cave is guarded by level 76 Last Rhogul. The clock can be changed until the area is raining during the day or changed to night time to clear the Rhogul, allowing to enter the cave that leads to Believer's Paradise.
"Return to Batubatu."
Head back to Traveller's Rest to find Batubatu.
uniqueComments:
: 'Reyn': ''"Again? What's he playing at? Why did you take your eyes off him?"''
: 'Gerugu': "Gerugu need to watch Batubatu every second in every day. Batubatu always get lost and never listen to what Gerugu say."
: 'Reyn': ''"You're amazing. There aren't many like you around. Maybe I had the Nopon all wrong."''
results: ''"Batubatu has proven just how unreliable he is but he promises that it won't happen again."''

name: With Much Gratitude
description: "Batubatu wants to give someone a gift of gratitude. There are two key ingredients needed to make Secret Nopon Elixir. Find them on Batubatu's behalf."
walkthrough:
''"Collect a Tokilos' Egg near Zax Guidepost in Bionis' Leg."''

''"Collect a Pandora Mushroom from Windy Cave on the Bionis' Leg."''

That medicine contains all the love and kindness Norara has for you. She cares about you sooo much she made a cure for your illness. So be a good girl, and drink up now."

Category:XC Mutually Exclusive Quests
results: ''"Norara and Perrine's joint efforts have resulted in a medicine to help cure Norara's friend's illness."''

name: What is Courage?!
description: "Ewan channeled his feelings of love into his novel, but couldn't hand it over. He'll go on an adventure to gain the courage to do so, but might need some protection."
walkthrough:
"Head in the direction of the Ether Mine or Satorl Marsh and protect Ewan from harm."
"Speak to Ewan."
uniqueComments:
: 'Sharla': ''"That sounds dangerous, Ewan. It's no walk in the park outside of the colony."''
: 'Ewan': ''"Don't you think I know that?! But I have to go. When I face a terrible beast, I'll face it as a man. Then I'll have the courage to give Matryona my book."''
: 'Sharla': ''"Matryona isn't a monster. She won't bite your head off!"''
: 'Ewan': ''"Well... I understand that. But if she rejects me it'll be worse than being eaten alive."''
Category:Colony 6 Quests
results: ''"The adventure helped build his courage and now he's ready to confess his love to Matryona."''

name: What is Love?!

prerequisites.label: Matryona registered in the Colony 6 area Affinity Chart

description: "Ewan's worried because he doesn't know how to write a romantic novel. Speak to people who know about such things and pass their advice on to Ewan."
walkthrough:
"Speak to an old Nopon inventor." (Satata)
"Speak to a Homs lady who understands medicine." (Olga)
"Speak to a stubborn old Homs man." (Gorman)
"Speak to a haughty young Homs girl." (Anna)
"Report back to Ewan."
uniqueComments:
: 'Sharla': "Are you sure this is for your book? Come on now. Tell me the truth!"
: 'Ewan': "Sharla, give me a break, will you?"
: 'Sharla': ''"Tell me the truth or I won't lift a finger for you."''
: 'Ewan': ''"Well... No, I can't... Just ask around and maybe I'll tell you later."''
Category:Colony 6 Quests
results: "Having overcome his inability to write romance, Ewan decided to confess his love for Matryona."

name: A Gift?
description: "A Nopon called Dedeba has asked for some Highmore Caviar from Zazadan. Take it to him."
walkthrough:
"Speak to a male Nopon called Dedeba."
Hint: Pollen Orb Storehouse (Frontier Village 2F) from 18:00 to 3:00.
uniqueComments:
: 'Sharla': ''"It shouldn't be too much work if all we have to do is take it. Or will that stuff attract monsters?"''
: 'Zazadan': "That no happen. It just a coincidence last time. It just because monsters think Zazadan look delicious."
: 'Sharla': "That simple? We just have to deliver it?"
Category:Satorl Marsh Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests
results: "You handed the Highmore Caviar over to Dedeba. What is he going to do with it though?"

name: A Merciful End
description: "Even after becoming a Telethia, Galvin continues to guard the Imperial palace. He no longer remembers who he was. It is best to put him out of his misery."
walkthrough:
"Defeat LV88 Telethia Galvin in Revelation Hall at Alcamoth."
Revelation Hall is reached from the teleporter at the end of the Audience Chamber. In order for the teleporters to function, Broken Ether Furnace 2 must be completed first. Telethia Galvin will drop an Armour Shard.
"Report to Rozeal."
uniqueComments:
: 'Dunban': "He may now be a Telethia but I respect him as a fellow warrior. I understand, and want to help. I will end his suffering."
: 'Rozeal': "Please forgive me. Those words alone have given me great comfort."
Category:Satorl Marsh Quests
results: ''"There was nothing left of Galvin's old self. At least now he will be able to rest in peace."''

name: A Mysterious Delicacy
description: "Apparently something amazing will appear if you dip a Red Pollen Orb into the Shining Pond."
walkthrough:
''"Investigate Dark Swamp's Shining Pond in Satorl Marsh."''
Hint: Warp to the Silent Obelisk and then head in the south direction to reach the Dark Swamp. Cross the swamp to find an uphill passage that leads to a cave. If necessary, equip Terrain Defence gems to reduce damage from the swamp. The Shining Pond is inside the cave.
"Return to Zazadan."
uniqueComments:
: 'Dunban': "You certainly do seem excited. I would be lying if I said I was not intrigued."
: 'Zazadan': "Great! Once you see what it make, you want more and more!"
: 'Dunban': "Is it really that amazing? I must admit that I have never heard of it before."
Category:Satorl Marsh Quests
results: "Highmore Caviar came out of the Red Pollen Orb. Zazadan is really happy."

name: A Release From Duty
description: "There are other guards like Galvin protecting the imperial capital. Send them to a happier place too."
walkthrough:
"Defeat Telethia Lecrough in the area of the Great Hall in Alcamoth."
"Defeat Telethia Galdo in the area of the Imperial Villa in Alcamoth."
"Defeat Telethia Kaelin in the area of the Sky Terrace in Alcamoth."
"Defeat Telethia Donnis in the area of the Audience Chamber in Alcamoth."
"Return to Rozeal."
uniqueComments:
: 'Melia': "Our Imperial Guards were so devoted to protecting us. They must be allowed to rest in peace. That is the only thing we can do for them now."
: 'Rozeal': ''"So you agree? Then I ask you, won't you release them from their duty?"''
Category:Satorl Marsh Quests
results:
"You have put the guardians of the Imperial City to rest."
clr

name: Ancient Ceremony Offerings
description: "It is necessary to provide proof for the ceremony. There are 4 offerings in Satorl Marsh. Collect them and prepare for the Coming-of-Age Ceremony.
walkthrough:
"Offering in Igna Territory. Collect the Blue Radiant."
"Offering at the Altar of Fate. Collect the Rainbow Radiant."
"Offering at Dark Swamp. Collect the Dull Radiant."
"Offering at Basin Cave. Collect the White Radiant."
results:
''"You have collected the 4 offerings. It's time to go to the Sororal Statues to perform the ceremony."''
Category:XC Story Quests
Category:Satorl Marsh Quests

name: Challenge
description: "The High Entia encountered a terrible beast when out foraging for food at night. Defeat it so he can continue looking for food."
walkthrough:
"Defeat LV83 Veteran Yozel at Silent Obelisk in Satorl Marsh"
Note: The actual location is southeast of Barren Moor. Foggy night only. Yozel is guarded by three Green Ferises.
"Report to the male High Entia near the Sororal Statues."
results:
"You helped the High Entia refugee. Now he should be able to continue his foraging."
Category:Satorl Marsh Quests

name: For a Friend
description: "Rozeal's close friend, Galvin, turned into a Telethia right before her eyes. However, he left without attacking her. She wants to find out where he is now."
walkthrough:
"Talk to Scarlen in Satorl Marsh."
Hint: Oath Sanctuary (anytime, before The Imperial Ceremony cleared) or Sororal Statues (18:00 - 03:00, after The Imperial Ceremony cleared).
"Talk to Kaleka in Frontier Village."
Hint: Ground floor. Near Nopon Tower from 21:00 - 03:00.
"Talk to Atael in Frontier Village."
Hint: Bottom floor. Near the pod from 09:00 - 15:00.
"Return to Rozeal."
uniqueComments:
: 'Fiora': "That must feel terrible. Someone you knew, being forced to attack people against his will."
: 'Rozeal': "I will understand if you decline. I know there is much you have to do. But it would make me truly happy if you could help Galvin."
Category:Satorl Marsh Quests
results: "After speaking to former Alcamoth residents, you have determined that Galvin is in Revelation Hall."

name: Gather Information
description: "Zazadan seems to know something. Ask him and obtain some information about the black market."
walkthrough:
"Interrogate Zazadan who is in the Nopon Refuge of Satorl Marsh."
Choose "What happens if it's processed?"
"Continue your interrogation of Zazadan."
Choose "We don't blame you."
"Force a confession out of Zazadan."
Choose "Ask where Dedeba is."
results: "You might find Dedeba with the note Zazadan left behind. Ask Gadada to read it for you."

name: Imperial Ceremony Offerings
description: "There are Radiants located in various places relating to the High Entia. Travel the world and look for the Radiants."
walkthrough:
"Collect the Mist Radiant from the area of Basin Cave in Satorl Marsh."
Hint: Go west from Sororal Statues landmark.
"Collect the Ocean Radiant from the area of Central Seal Island at Eryth Sea."
Hint: Central platform from above the area.
"Collect the Imperial Radiant from the area of the Ceremony Hall in the High Entia Tomb."
"Collect the Snow Radiant from the area of the Sealed Tower at Valak Mountain."
results:
"You have collected all of the radiants. Return to Satorl to perform the ceremony."
Category:Satorl Marsh Quests

name: It's All in the Mind
description: "Zazadan is still not well. Get some of the Nopon Potion to see if that will heal his injuries."
walkthrough:
"Collect some Nopon Potion in the area of Lacus Swamp in Satorl Marsh."
Hint: Head to the south of Nopon Merchant Camp. Follow the southern passage up the slope that leads to a cave and then eventually the potion.
"Return to Zazadan."
uniqueComments:
: 'Shulk': ''"Do you really feel that bad? Don't you think you should go back to your people?"''
: 'Zazadan': "Zazadan no can go! Zazadan feel too ill to go!"
: 'Shulk': ''"You're right. Maybe your wound got infected."''
Category:Satorl Marsh Quests
results: "The Nopon Potion has done the trick! Zazadan is fully recovered."

name: Kacha's Kidnapping
description: "The scholar Kacha was carried off by Ignas. It seems there is something they want to know. Go to Exile Fortress and save Kacha."
walkthrough:
"Save Kacha who is in Exile Fortress in Satorl Marsh."
The Exile Fortress is located west of the Glowing Obelisk, and is occupied by the level 31 Reckless Godwin and several Ignas who all face the main entrance.
Kacha can be rescued without alerting the enemies by obtaining the Rear Door Key and entering through the rear door. The key can be found under a lone tree on the lower area along the west side of Exile Fortress. The rear door can be reached by following a grassy ledge along the east, north, and west sides of Exile Fortress.
"Return to Bokoko."
uniqueComments:
: 'Sharla': "This is serious. But what could the Ignas possibly hope to learn from him?"
: 'Bokoko': "It must be about that big secret. But Bokoko no know very much."
: 'Sharla': "An important secret? It sounds fascinating. But his safety is the top priority."
results: "Kacha has been rescued. However, she has told a secret to the Ignas."

name: Making Camp
description: "Bokoko is feeling ill and needs your help preparing a camp. Collect some materials to make a bed."
walkthrough:
"Collect 4 Glowing Upa Seeds from Upas in Satorl Marsh."
Hint: ~LV22 Acid Upas in Kelsher Wetland and Lacus Swamp
"Collect 3 Fancy Volff Hides from Volffs in Satorl Marsh."
Hint: Trade with Kacha (1,350+ G)
Day only. Level 24 Satorl Volffs are near Zaldania Waterfall
"Collect 4 Feather Leaves in Satorl Marsh."
Hint: They are frequently found in wet areas at night. Kelsher Wetland, Basin Cave, Zaldania Waterfall, etc.
Trade with Daza (☆3) at Colony 6. He is located near the Hope Farm.
"Collect 3 Wool Rocks in Satorl Marsh."
Hint: They share identical spawn points as Feather Leaf at some locations at night.
"Return to Bokoko."
uniqueComments:
: 'Sharla': ''"Nopon are so fluffy anyway. Can't you just sleep as you are?"''
: 'Bokoko': "That not good. Ground here not comfortable. Bokoko sometimes want to sleep with soft duvet like Hom Hom."
: 'Sharla': "I suppose so. Travelling is so tiring. I miss my nice soft bed too."
Category:Satorl Marsh Quests
results: ''"You've collected the items for a comfortable bed. Now Bokoko should be able to get some sleep."''

name: Monster Quest 1
description: "The Nopon Merchant was almost eaten by a Brog. Make sure it never happens again by killing some of them."
walkthrough:
"Defeat 2 Detox Brogs in Satorl Marsh."
Hint: Lacus Swamp or area below Altar of Fate.
results:
''"You completed the Nopon Merchant's request. Hopefully it won't happen again."''
Category:Satorl Marsh Quests

name: Monster Quest 2
description: "There are some monsters disturbing the camp. Defeat them and solve the problem."
walkthrough:
"Defeat 3 Coppice Quadwings in Satorl Marsh."
Hint: They are sitting near the top of the trees during the day. Lacus Swamp, Zaldania Waterfall, etc.
results:
''"You completed the Nopon Merchant's request. Hopefully the camp will be safe now."''
Category:Satorl Marsh Quests

name: Monster Quest 3
description: "Nopon generally venture out during the day. However, they keep meeting terrible monsters on Barren Moor. Defeat the monsters."
walkthrough:
"Defeat 2 Mist Rhoguls in Satorl Marsh."
Hint: They can found in a few locations during the day. Southeast of Barren Moor, south of Altar of Fate, etc.
results:
''"You completed the Nopon Merchant's request. Now the daytime will be safe for Nopon."''
Category:Satorl Marsh Quests

name: Monster Quest 4
description: "There are terrible monsters attacking the camp. The responsibility for the camp's safety falls on the oldest, Bokoko. Help him by defeating one of the monsters."
walkthrough:
"Defeat 1 Officer Volff in Satorl Marsh."
Hint: Day only. The area between Barren Moor and Dark Swamp.
results:
''"You completed the Nopon Merchant's request. Now the camp should be a little safer."''
Category:Satorl Marsh Quests

name: Preventing Starvation
description: "Zazadan was injured by some monsters and he hasn't been able to move properly since. He also hasn't had any food. Bring him some food."
walkthrough:
"Collect 2 Twin Flamii Eggs from Flamii in Satorl Marsh."
Hint: level 22 Satorl Flamiis or level 23 Marsh Flamiis at Kelsher Wetland
"Collect 5 Lemon Stones in Satorl Marsh."
Hint: Trade with Kacha (☆1). She is initially held hostage in the Exile Fortress, but ''Kacha's Kidnapping'' must be accepted. After rescuing her, she can be found in the Nopon Merchant Camp.
"Return to Zazadan."
uniqueComments:
: 'Sharla': ''"Are you sure you're alright? You look in a bad way."''
: 'Zazadan': "At first Zazadan slept to keep hungry feeling away... But now it too difficult to sleep."
: 'Sharla': ''"Why were you attacked? Wouldn't the monsters stay away from the Glowing Obelisk? Anyway, now is not the time to think about such things."''
Category:Satorl Marsh Quests
results: "You helped Zazadan stop his stomach rumbling. But he is still very badly injured..."

name: The Ancient Ceremony
description: "According to the Nopon Merchant, only those who complete an ancient High Entia ceremony will be granted passage to the upper regions of the Bionis."
walkthrough:
"Complete preparations for the ceremony." (see Ancient Ceremony Offerings.)
"Present the offerings to the Adulthood Emblem to complete the Coming-of-Age Ceremony."
"Defeat the LV28 Satorl Guardian."
results:
"The Coming-of-Age Ceremony is complete and the path to the top of the Bionis is open."
Category:XC Story Quests
Category:Satorl Marsh Quests

name: The Giants' Key
description: "Ignas are looking for the Giant's Key so they can get their hands on the treasure of the Giants. You must find a way of stopping them."
walkthrough:
"Defeat 5 Deluded Ignas on the high plateau of Dark Swamp in Satorl Marsh."
Hint: The plateau is on the right side of Dark Swamp. The passage that leads to the plateau is at northwest of Exile Fortress. The Deluded Ignas are level 24-25.User:SakuDio/Screenshot References
''"Dig up the Giants' Key on the plateau above Dark Swamp in Satorl Marsh."''
"Investigate the altar on the roof of Exile Fortress in Satorl Marsh."
Hint: Enter Exile Fortress and investigate the door (Wall of Sin) behind the throne. Use the key to open the secret door, which leads to the top of the fortress.
"Return to Kacha."
uniqueComments:
: 'Dunban': "Giants... Did they really exist here?"
: 'Kacha': "You saw when you saved Kacha. Ignas took Kacha to huge building."
: 'Dunban': "I agree. A building of such size could only have been used by giants."
results: "You stopped the treasure falling into the hands of the Ignas. Kacha will explain the altar to you."

name: The Giants' Treasure
description: "You have to make an offering to obtain the Giants' treasure. Collect the Giants' Mirror and place it on the altar."
walkthrough:
''"Collect the Giants' Mirror in the area of Daksha Shrine on the Bionis' Leg northeast of Viliera Hill''."
Hint: the level 32 Unique Monster Clifftop Bayern may appear when approaching the item.
''"Offer the Giants' Mirror on the altar on the roof of Exile Fortress."''
When the Giants' Mirror is used on the altar, three level 32 Deified Queens will appear.
"Return to Kacha."
uniqueComments:
: 'Shulk': "So they may have been big but they valued rules and order."
: 'Kacha': "Maybe that how Giants were. But Kacha think there also Giants who fought White Spiders."
: 'Shulk': "I see. I suppose they were all different. Just like us."
Category:Satorl Marsh Quests
results: "You got the Daring of the Giants from the altar on Exile Fortress. But now you need something else."

name: The Imperial Ceremony
description: "The imperial family used to hold ceremonies in Satorl. Perhaps completing this ceremony will grant you something that may be of use in future battles."
walkthrough:
"Collect the Radiants from all around the world in order to perform the ceremony."
"Offer the Radiants to the engravings at the Sororal Statues in Satorl Marsh."
"Defeat LV86 Radiant Pterix at the Sororal Statues in Satorl Marsh."
Hint: It has a counter bind spike.
uniqueComments:
: 'Melia': "I have heard of the old imperial ceremonies. I wonder what they were like. As a High Entia, I would certainly like to try it and see."
: 'Scarlen': "I too am intrigued as a fellow High Entia. But I am unable to travel around the world as you can."
Category:Satorl Marsh Quests
results:
"Offering the Radiants made a Guardian appear. Defeating it earned you the High Entia Emblem."
clr

name: Zazadan in Danger
description: "Zazadan is too scared of monsters now to go outside. Clear the monsters so that Zazadan can venture out."
walkthrough:
"Defeat 8 Ogre Bunnias in Satorl Marsh."
Hint: The area north of Glowing Obelisk.
"Report to Zazadan."
uniqueComments:
: 'Reyn': ''"Why are all the Nopon we meet so weird? Would you rather we hadn't saved you?"''
: 'Zazadan': "Zazadan only joking! Zazadan really grateful! There still lots Zazadan has to do."
: 'Reyn': "Yeah, I knew you were joking. What do you want us to do?"
Category:Satorl Marsh Quests
results: "You have cleared the monsters but something still seems to be bothering Zazadan."

name: Zazadan Still in Danger
description: "Zazadan has told you that there is a flying monster that also wants to eat him. Kill this monster to alleviate Zazadan's fears."
walkthrough:
"Defeat Sunlight Schvaik in the area of Barren Moor in Satorl Marsh. (Only at daytime)."
Note: The actual location is at the Silent Obelisk landmark.
"Report to Zazadan."
uniqueComments:
: 'Zazadan': ''"You should have thought 'We kill flying monster for friend Zazadan'!"''
: 'Dunban': "That is some interesting logic. I doubt that a Homs would arrive at the same conclusion."
: 'Zazadan': "Zazadan no care about that. Big monster wants to kill Zazadan."
: 'Dunban': "It looks as if we have no choice. Will you tell us the name of this monster that is out to get you?"
Category:Satorl Marsh Quests
results: ''"Now the monsters really are all cleared, but Zazadan still doesn't seem well enough."''

name: Bridge Repair

prerequisites.label: Access to Pod Landing Site in order to reach Valak Mountain

description: "The broken bridge is causing problems for the Nopon. If they had the material, they could fix it. Help them by collecting the materials they need to mend it."
walkthrough:
"Collect 5 Hode Planks from Hodes in Makna Forest."
Hint: If the player decides to repair the bridge now, then look for LV30 Scout Hodes or level 31 Hyle Hodes. They can be found mostly in the eastern part of Makna Forest. Locations: Abyss Basin, Hode Lair, Precipice Bridge, etc.
Trade with Lupa (☆3) at Frontier Village
After Mechonis Core is cleared, the item can be traded with Nelo (1740+ G) at Frontier Village
"Collect 3 Rhogul Axe Crests from Mist Rhoguls in Satorl Marsh."
The level 25 Mist Rhoguls can be found in several areas during the day. Locations: Dark Swamp, Barren Moor, etc.
After Mechonis Core is cleared, the item can be traded with Rozeal (☆3) at Sororal Statues in Satorl Marsh
"Return to the Nopon in charge of bridge repair."
uniqueComments:
: 'Sharla': ''"It is inconvenient. If the High Entia hadn't brought us, we couldn't have got here. What a pain!"''
: 'Nopon Researcher': "Yeah, it horrible! But it fate that you here."
: 'Sharla': "You might be right. But what do you want us to do?"
Category:Makna Forest Quests
results: "The bridge has been repaired. The Nopon of Frontier Village are very happy."

name: Challenge
description: "There are lots of terrifying monsters in Makna Forest. Clear some of them so the road is safe."
walkthrough:
"Defeat Shimmering Forte near the Eks Watering Hole in Makna Forest. (On a hot day.)"
Hint: Southeast of Eks Watering Hole. Forte is level 33 and has a counter damage spike.
results:
''"You completed the Nopon Merchant's request. The Nopon can wash safely now."''
Category:Makna Forest Quests

name: Challenge of the Sage
description: "You have had to accept the Nopon Sage's challenge. Go to a dangerous place and demonstrate your courage."
walkthrough:
"Go to the Seahorse Islet in Makna Forest and collect the Proof of Courage."
Hint: From the river underneath Bridge One, Bridge Two, and Bridge Three, the direction of the stream must be followed, which will eventually lead to the location.
"Return to the Nopon Sage."
uniqueComments:
: 'Riki': "What Seahorse Islet? Riki no want to do! It dangerous! Riki no want get hurt!"
: 'Nopon Sage': "Stop your complaining! This is a test! You want me to approve of you! Then be silent!"
Category:Makna Forest Quests
results: "Through your successful completion of this final test the Nopon Sage recognises your courage."

name: Final Challenge of the Sage
description: "You are to take the Nopon Sage's final test. You must go to a little island at Great Makna Falls and demonstrate your strength."
walkthrough:
"Go to Great Makna Falls in Makna Forest and defeat LV96 Unreliable Rezno. (Only during daytime.)"
Hint: The little island is located west of the Divine Sanctuary. Unreliable Rezno will only spawn if there is not torrid weather.
"Return to the Nopon Sage."
results:
"You have completed the final test. The Nopon Sage is impressed and gives you a gift."
Category:Makna Forest Quests
Category:XC Skill Tree Quests

name: Legend of the Sage
description: "Ask a child in Frontier Village to tell you why the Nopon Sage is so great."
walkthrough:
"Talk to Pipiki in Frontier Village."
Hint: Central Plaza from 06:00 to 15:00.
"Return to the Nopon Sage."
"Talk to Pachipa in Frontier Village."
Hint: Archaeology Centre from 9:00 to 15:00.
"Return to the Nopon Sage."
uniqueComments:
: 'Dunban': "All we heard from the children is that you live here."
: 'Nopon Sage': "Then you must find out more about me and return. Listen to what the littlepon in the village have to say. Only then will you come to understand my greatness."
: 'Dunban': "Hmm... Your greatness? What benefit would knowing of your greatness be to us?"
: 'Nopon Sage': "I will not give you the treasure as long as you maintain that attitude."
Category:Makna Forest Quests
results: "You understand a little better why the Nopon Sage is so great."

name: Monster Quest 1
description: "There are lots of terrifying monsters in Makna Forest. Clear some of them so the road is safe."
walkthrough:
"Defeat 5 Jungle Quadwings in Makna Forest."
Hint: ~LV29. Locations: Area below Agni Tablet, south of Waypoint Beacon, east of Nopon Arch
results:
''"You completed the Nopon Merchant's request. The road to Frontier Village is a little safer."''
Category:Makna Forest Quests

name: Monster Quest 2
description: "There are lots of terrifying monsters in Makna Forest. Defeat some to stop them eating the local Nopon."
walkthrough:
"Defeat 2 Makna Feris in Makna Forest."
Hint: Level 31. Locations: Near Waypoint Beacon, Sparkling Pool, etc.
results:
''"You completed the Nopon Merchant's request. The road to Frontier Village is a little safer."''
Category:Makna Forest Quests

name: Monster Quest 3
description: "There are lots of terrifying monsters in Makna Forest. Clear some that attack the Nopon from the air."
walkthrough:
"Defeat 2 Makna Ansels in Makna Forest."
Hint: Level 33. Locations: Eks Watering Hole, etc.
results:
''"You completed the Nopon Merchant's request. The road to Frontier Village is a little safer."''
Category:Makna Forest Quests

name: Monster Quest 4
description: "There are lots of terrifying monsters in Makna Forest. Clear some of them so the road is safe."
walkthrough:
"Defeat 3 Makna Eks in Makna Forest."
Hint: Level 33. Locations: Eks Watering Hole, etc.
results:
''"You completed the Nopon Merchant's request. The road to Frontier Village is a little safer."''
Category:Makna Forest Quests

name: Mystery Girl Rescue
description: "High purity Water Ether Crystals are needed to save a girl. There should be some near the large waterfall. Find some Water Ether Crystals in Makna Forest."
walkthrough:
"Collect some Water Ether Crystals."
Hint: They can be found by the Lakeside.
results:
"You found some Water Ether Crystals. These should be able to help save the girl now."
Category:XC Story Quests
Category:Makna Forest Quests

name: A Gift For Miko
description: "Pelupelu not like working hard before but seeing Miko work hard make Pelupelu want to work hard too. Want to show Miko that Pelupelu serious!"
walkthrough:
"Grab 5 Wisp Glow Sticks from Bunker Wisps in Colony 6."
Hint: Night only. ~LV26 Bunker Wisps are by the Pod Depot.
Trade with Talonyth (☆3) at Colony 6
"Grab 3 Ansel Fish Pies from Ansels on Valak Mountain."
Hint: LV45 Atomis Ansels (day only) or LV46 Atomizek Ansels (night only) in the vicinity of Sealed Tower, Nopon Camp, etc.
After Mechonis Core is cleared, trade with Kurralth (☆3) at Harict Chapel, Valak Mountain
"Grab 5 Wet Rats on Valak Mountain."
Hint: Chilkin Lair (night only)
"Go see Pelupelu."
uniqueComments:
: 'Dunban': "Great idea! I remember how glad I felt when I received a present from Fiora. Although her words alone would have been enough for me."
: 'Pelupelu': "Right! Right! Friends understand."
Category:Frontier Village Quests
results: "Miko work hardest at prayers and now Pelupelu love to watch Miko!"

name: A Memento of Daddy

prerequisites.label: Cian registered on the Central Bionis Affinity Chart

description: "Atael's sister, Cian, is always down-hearted. Apparently their father buried something precious by the fountain he used to visit. Will you fetch it for her?"
walkthrough:
"Collect something precious that has been buried near the Fountain of Hope in Alcamoth."
The party will need to use the transporter at the Centre Gate in Eryth Sea. The item is a Family Picture that can be found southeast from the Fountain of Hope.
''"Defeat Telethia Vol'aren near the Fountain of Hope in Alcamoth."''
"Return to Atael."
uniqueComments:
: 'Fiora': "A precious object? What kind of object?"
: 'Atael': ''"I didn't get to ask him what it was. He just told me to dig it up if anything ever happened."''
Category:Frontier Village Quests
results: "It was a very special family photo. Atael cried with delight when he saw it."

name: A Tormented Bug-Lover
description: "Deki get it wrong! Ababa like spicy things! Bet he won't like to eat sour things! This will stop him eating bugs."
walkthrough:
"Grab 5 lots of Bitter Wisp Fluid from Colony Wisps in Colony 6."
Night only. Level 18 Colony Wisps can be found around the Watchpoint Junction.
"Have Ababa drink it and see what he thinks."

name: Mystery of Makna Ruins 2
description: "We must recite a prayer to open door to ruins. There big tablet in front of door. Pray real hard at it! Find out what inside and come back and tell me!"
walkthrough:
''"Recite the prayer in front of King Agni's Tomb."''
Hint: At the Pod Landing Site, the H-shaped area on the map, it is located in the lower left area of the H. There is a passage that leads to King Agni's Tomb. Once at the location, the Tablet Seal must be investigated and a door will slide open. The quest objective (the orange exclamation point) can be seen from the Valak Pass.
''"Investigate the inside of King Agni's Tomb."''
Brutal Gravar guards the coffin, it can be defeated as probably initially expected, but it can be also avoided, especially by equipping Earth Cloak gems, getting around it until reaching the red exclamation mark under its legs without being detected by it.
"Go see Lupa."
uniqueComments:

: 'Lupa': "These not curly squiggles! This important ancient writing! Friends not moved by the fact that writing existed in ancient times?"
Category:Frontier Village Quests
results: "There coffin deep inside the ruins? We must move that coffin!"

description: "We need Lubricant Oil to move the heavy coffin. Go get materials!"

: 'Lupa': "Ah, yes! If friends find bones, then bring them here to me. It may help us understand the biology of the Giants."
: 'Riki': "B-b-bones?! Lupa want us to bring b-b-bones?! Wah! Waaah! Waaaaaaaaah!"
Category:Frontier Village Quests
results: "I can make excellent Lubricant Oil now! You can rub this on the coffin to move it."

description: "Pipiki hear terrible noise at night! It go 'hooooorrrrr' and 'haaaaarrrrr'. It come from underground! Pipiki run now!"
walkthrough:
"Seek out what is behind the strange voice."
Hint: Tati from 18:00 to 0:00 at the Nopon Kitchen
"Grab 3 Hode Camouflages from Hodes in Makna Forest."
Hint: ~LV29 Bois Hodes and ~LV30 Bosque Hodes at Abyss Basin, Precipice Bridge, Hode Lair, etc.
Trade with Minana (☆3), or Kaleka (1740+ G) after Mechonis Core is cleared
"Give the Hode Camouflages to Tati."
"Return to Pipiki."
uniqueComments:
: 'Reyn': "What, a ghost? Here in the village?"
: 'Pipiki': "Friend very big Hom Hom. Surely friend not afraid of ghosts!"
: 'Reyn': ''"C-course I'm not scared! I'll thrash that ghost so bad it'll be wishing it was dead!"''
: 'Pipiki': "Really? Friend real nice guy!"
Category:Frontier Village Quests
results: ''"It wasn't a ghost singing. It was lullaby. Pipiki sleep well now."''

name: Sweet Seduction

prerequisites.label: Kofuko registered on the Affinity Chart

rewards: Aerial Cloak II (A route) or Aquatic Cloak II (B route)
description: "*sniff* *sniff, sniff* Oh! I was watching over altar when I smell sweet smell! It smell of sickly drink I know. If it fell in water it will make everyone get ill!"
walkthrough:
"Talk to Kofuko."
"Investigate the source of the sweet smell."
The quest Ingredients For A Brew is triggered and must be completed, two routes are proposed
"Go see Migaga."
results:
'A route:' "Kofuko is making a sweet fruit drink at the altar? It does smell fruity good... Now I want to drink it!"
'B route:' "Kofuko is making a sweet fruit drink at the altar? Disgusting! Why he use such bad ingredients?!"

name: The Master's Successor
description: "It time that someone else took over Pollen Works. Dobadoba want to pass on his way of life. Friends have to choose Gadada or Cherri!"
walkthrough:
"Chat to Gadada about his passions."
"Go see Dobadoba."
"Chat to Cherri about her passions."
"Go see Dobadoba."
uniqueComments:
: 'Riki': "If Dobaba sic need Heropon Riki, then Riki do good job! Leave it to Riki! No one better judge of character than Riki!"
: 'Dobadoba': "When you say it like that, Riki, I feel I am wrong to ask you..."
Category:Frontier Village Quests
results:
'A Route:' If 'Gadada' is chosen:,
"My successor will be Gadada! Dobadoba just glad reliable Nopon look after Pollen Works."
'B Route:' If 'Cherri' is chosen:,
"My successor will be Cherri! Dobadoba just glad clumsy but clever Nopon look after Pollen Works."

"Grab 2 Humming Cabbages in Satorl Marsh."

Igna Territory, near Glowing Obelisk, etc.
"Grab 2 Humming Nettles in Makna Forest."
Hint: Trade with Deki (☆2) or Yusa (6480+ G) at Frontier Village
results:

name: Who is Bigger?
description: "If Dabidabi had Enlarging Seaweed, he could make jump safe. Wait...! Will you take to Adidi or Dabidabi?"
walkthrough:
"Give the Enlarging Seaweed to Adidi or Dabidabi."
:'A Route:' Talk to Dabidabi.
:'B Route:' Talk to Adidi.
"Chat to Dabidabi."
results:
'A route:' "Enlarging Seaweed make me larger! Adidi my love! I jump to you now!"
'B route:' "Enlarging Seaweed make Adidi larger! Adidi my love! Catch me!"
clr

name: World's Strongest Flavour
description: "Teeth are better and Kofuko can eat tough things. That good, but Kofuko food taste.. well, tasteless! Kofuko want to eat rich food with strong taste!"
walkthrough:
"Grab 2 Crimson Citruses in Frontier Village."
Hint: Trade with Medi (☆4)
"Grab 2 Ruby Mangosteens on Valak Mountain."

uniqueComments:
: 'Reyn': ''"What's the strongest tasting food here then?"''

Category:XC Mutually Exclusive Quests
results: "This cooking taste very strong! Very surprising! Kofuko feel like having these snacks with a drink!"

name: Ancient High Entia Mystery
description: "It seems that there is a statue of the War God in Valak Mountain. Complete the research into the War God faith for Ruthan and Naroth."
walkthrough:
"Investigate the War God statue at La Luz Church in Valak Mountain."
La Luz Church is at the southern end (lower level) of Valak Mountain, after climbing long vines. The High Entia Emblem is required to unlock the seal on the door.
When the War God Statue is examined, a Level 97 Glory Slobos (daytime) or Level 99 Gloria Slobos (nighttime) will spawn. Defeating it is entirely optional.
"Talk to Talia."
results: "The birthplace of the War God faith must be Valak Mountain. Their research is complete."

name: Challenge
description: "Eryth Sea is very dangerous. There is a particularly terrifying monster that should be exterminated."
walkthrough:
"Defeat Flabbergasted Jerome in the area of Hovering Reef 5 in the Eryth Sea."
The Flabbergasted Jerome can be found by jumping through the middle of the hovering reef to get to the island below. It only appears on a sunny day.
results: ''"You completed the lighthouse keeper's request. Eryth Sea should be a little safer now."''

results:

description: "Cronies of the defeated Hode leader want revenge."
walkthrough:
"Defeat 2 Confusion Ekidnos at Eryth Sea." You do not need to search for them as they will appear at Ether Plant after the conversation.
"Return to Jarack."
results:
"You defeated the cronies of the Hode leader so the Ether Plant should be safe... finally!"
Category:Eryth Sea Quests

name: I Will Never Forget You
description: "When Vidian fled the imperial capital, she was helped by Telethia, which are revealed to be two of her old friends. It's sad, but you have to kill them both."
walkthrough:
"Defeat 10 Arel Telethia in Alcamoth."
"Defeat Telethia Arielle near the Fountain of Eternity in Alcamoth."
It is found southwest of the Fountain of Eternity.
"Defeat Telethia Lesunia near Melfica Road in Alcamoth."
It is found at the south of Melfica Road (also southwest from the Imperial Palace landmark).
"Return to Vidian."
The Affection Seal Half and Arielle's Ring are handed over.
uniqueComments:
: 'Fiora': "It must be awful to see a friend attacking people like that. She must be suffering so greatly. I understand how you are feeling. She needs to be released from her agony."
Category:Eryth Sea Quests
Category:XC Mutually Exclusive Quests
results:
''"Now Vidian's two friends rest in peace. She is deep in a moving prayer."''
clr

name: Investigating Satorl
description: "Miriall tried to stop Talia but Talia didn't listen and went off to Satorl all alone. Talia could be in grave danger. Go and help her."
walkthrough:
"Defeat Dogmatic Gogol near the Place of Judgement in Satorl Marsh."
It is level 35.
"Talk to Talia who is at the Place of Judgement in Satorl Marsh."
She can be found by travelling to the Glowing Obelisk landmark, then going east and upwards to the river. After that by going up the hill and a Gogol, Talia will be standing behind the stone.
"Talk to Talia who is on the Ether Plant at Eryth Sea."
She can be found under the platform at around 22:00
uniqueComments:
: 'Melia': "How could she go off alone when things are so dangerous? I cannot just ignore the peril of a fellow High Entia. Please leave this to us."
: 'Miriall': "If you ask, I am sure she will tell you the reasons for her actions. If I was a little younger, I would want to help her out myself."
: 'Melia': "So she is prepared to go to Satorl despite the great personal risk... I would like to know her reason. I hope the others will agree but we must go after her."
Category:Eryth Sea Quests
Category:XC Mutually Exclusive Quests
results: "Talia wanted to complete the research into the War God faith for her lost friends."

name: Secret Research

name: The Missing Boy
description: "Miriall fled the capital with Teelan, but at some point seems to have lost sight of him. Find Teelan to ease her worried heart."
walkthrough:
"Talk to Teelan."
He can be found by warping into the city from the Centre Gate in Eryth Sea, going all the way to the right, and to the first floor. He is on the small room at the south of the bridge.
"Return to Miriall."
uniqueComments:
: 'Riki': "Little boy gone missing? That really bad! We have to find him quick! Little boy must be really hungry! Riki no like being hungry!"

results:
''"Teelan was hiding in the imperial capital. You rescued him, and put Miriall's worries to rest."''
clr

name: Trouble at the Plant
description: "One of the wind turbines was attacked by Hodes. Help resolve the Ether Plant problem."

Punish the Hodes is automatically triggered and must be completed

"Return to Jarack."
uniqueComments:
: 'Shulk': ''"Do you want us to help fix it? This is an amazing machine. I'd love to learn more about it."''
: 'Jarrack': "It must seem amazing to your people. But it is not a recent creation. It has been here a very long time."
: 'Shulk': "High Entia technology is all so fascinating. It still looks brand-new and works perfectly even after so much time. Ah...although it is broken now."
Category:Eryth Sea Quests

results: "You helped the kidnapped Nopon who took some amazing information to the Research Team."

:'Dunban': "So the Chilkins are just like us Homs in that respect? I must admit this information has somewhat captured my interest."
Category:Valak Mountain Quests
results: "The research trip discovered that the Chilkin Lair has been occupied by the Antols."

results: ''"By implanting the fibre into his muscles, Rakzet's body has become significantly more powerful."''
trivia:
It seems that this quest was originally planned to include fighting a strong Wisp and require additional items to collect. In fact, the Quest Exclusive Bright Wisp appears only during this quest, on clear nights at the westernmost part of Digit 3. It drops the Key Item Strong Lubricant Oil, which was probably meant for this quest originally. Furthermore, the Bright Wisp can respawn until the first objective is completed, meaning the party has not yet collected the five Silver Antol Fibres needed for the quest, making it possible to collect more than one Strong Lubricant Oil. In any case, if one or more Strong Lubricant Oils are collected, one will be deducted upon completion of this quest.
Category:Fallen Arm Quests

name: Back Pain

description: "A guard is suffering from back pain as a result of overexertion. Take care of a subjugation mission in his place, to put his friend's mind at rest."
walkthrough:
"Defeat 6 Archer Hodes in Eryth Sea."
"Return to Galdo."
uniqueComments:
: 'Shulk': ''"No, I think he is listening to you. After all, you're his friend! Just give him a bit more time. We would like to help as much as we can too!"''
: 'Galdo': ''"You're right. He is my friend. If I don't believe in him, then who will? You've helped me to realise something very important. Thanks a lot!"''
Category:Alcamoth Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests
results: "You took care of the mission, and the guard has promised not to push himself too hard in future."

name: Believing Again
description: "The old Lesunia didn't used to worry about race. Remind her of Vidian and get the two to be friends again."
walkthrough:
"Collect Morning Dew Ice from Befalgar Pedestal on Valak Mountain at 05:00 AM (dawn)."
"Talk to Vidian."
: She gives the Affection Seal Half.
"Talk to Lesunia."
"Return to Vidian."
uniqueComments:
: 'Sharla': ''"So you're saying she wasn't like this before? Seems a little hard to believe."''
: 'Vidian': ''"Yeah, she didn't care if you were Homs or Nopon or whatever. Then out of the blue, she started only liking 'pure' High Entia!"''
Category:Alcamoth Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests
results: ''"Lesunia has remembered how things used to be and she's now friends with Vidian."''

name: Brave Actions
description: "Mir'leiz says that there has been an unusual increase in monster numbers at Eryth Sea. Help the Imperial Guards protect Alcamoth."
walkthrough:
"Talk to Lecrough."
He will activate Protect the Capital!.
"Defeat 2 Buono Nebulae at Eryth Sea."
"Talk with Lecrough."
''"Return to Mir'leiz."''
uniqueComments:
: 'Melia': "Do you mean to say that they cannot protect the city unaided? And they dare to call themselves the Imperial Guard? Unbelievable! Are they all shirking their training?"
: Mir'leiz': "N-no, it's not that! There's just more monsters than we could have imagined!"''
: 'Melia': "That changes not the shame they bring upon themselves. Very well. I shall deal with them myself."
: Mir'leiz': "I'm sorry."''
Category:Alcamoth Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests
results: ''"The imperial city's safety has been ensured. Lecrough praised Mir'leiz for his actions."''

name: Bring Back My Son!
description: "Merisa's son Mir'leiz went to train at Eryth Sea. It's very dangerous there, so she wants you to find him and bring him back."
walkthrough:
''"Find Mir'leiz at Eryth Sea."''
He can be found on Hovering Reef 1.
"Return to Merisa."
uniqueComments:
: 'Sharla': ''"A little while ago, I was in a really similar spot. So, we'll help you as much as possible!"''
: 'Merisa': "Really?! Oh thank you! I feel reassured!"
Category:Alcamoth Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests
results: ''"Mir'leiz promised not to do anything else foolish so his mother won't have to worry any more."''

name: Building Bridges

prerequisites.label: Vidian registered on the Affinity Chart

description: "Arielle's daughter has suddenly decided she hates other races. Arielle wants you to find out why. Talk to Lesunia and find out what happened."
walkthrough:
"Talk to Lesunia."
(Melia must be the party leader.)
"Collect 2 pieces of Marine Marble at the Eryth Sea."
"Talk to Lesunia again"
(Melia must be the party leader.)
"Return to Arielle."
uniqueComments:
: 'Sharla': ''"She hates other races? I've heard that High Entia hate conflict, but..."''
: 'Arielle': ''"That's right! Normally no one cares. Although, I have heard of some very old texts... Texts which say things about only pure High Entia being acceptable. Old mumbo jumbo."''
Category:Alcamoth Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests
results: "You have found out why Lesunia hates other races, and you told her mother."

description: "Drydry likes all things High Entia; that's why he wants to make a headdress from their feathers he found in Alcamoth. Care to lend him a hand?"
