Hint: Near the Fountain of Eternity.
"Return to Drydry."
results:
"Drydry was overjoyed by the feathers you brought him. The headdress is sure to be interesting..."
Category:Alcamoth Quests

name: Getting a Member's Card
description: "You need to get a Secret Club Card so you can get in. This is the perfect chance - they don't know you're on to them yet! Quickly, find someone who has a card!"
walkthrough:
"Find Nelo who has a Secret Club Card."
"Collect 3 Rufus Control Units from Orluga Rufus in the High Entia Tomb."
"Give the Rufus Control Devices to Nelo."
results: "You got the membership card to get into the Secret Club! There is no time to lose!"

name: Going Out to Play
description: "Popipo's son hates to be outside lately. Talk to him, work out what the problem is and find a way of getting him to enjoy the outdoors."
walkthrough:
"Talk to Baroba."
"Collect 5 Ether Roses from Satorl Marsh."
"Return to Baroba."
"Talk to Popipo."
uniqueComments:
: 'Reyn': ''"Yeah, kids should be playing outside with their mates. I dunno what I'd do if I didn't have friends to save my bacon! So, I'd love it if you'd let me help."''
: 'Popipo': "You be careful now! I might get lovey-dovey for you! You very nice Hom Hom! Handsome Hom Hom! But it tough job for one Hom Hom! Talk with friends and then decide what you do!"
Category:Alcamoth Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests
results: ''"You solved Baroba's problem and though not the perfect solution, he's happy to be outside now."''

name: How Do I Feel?
description: "Scarlen still likes both girls but he's not sure which one he likes best. Ask both of the girls what their favourite memory of him is."
walkthrough:
"Talk to Rozeal or Ricoth."
: (See notes regarding the outcome of this choice.)
'A route': "Talk to Rozeal."
: If Ricoth was chosen first.
'B route': "Talk to Ricoth."
: If Rozeal was chosen first.
"Return to Scarlen."
uniqueComments:
: 'Sharla': ''"I can understand how your friends must feel. I can see how it must be easier to pretend that nothing's wrong. But you can't stay that way forever. That would solve nothing."''
: 'Scarlen': ''"You're right, of course. But even though it's all my fault, I still can't seem to decide."''
: 'Sharla': ''"It's not that they're angry at you. In fact, they're trying their best to keep your friendship alive. The question is, how will you respond to that?"''
: 'Scarlen': "Even I can see that things cannot go on like this. In fact, I am the one most terrified of ruining what we already have."
Category:Alcamoth Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests
results:
The results will depend on which girl was spoken to first:
:'Ricoth first (A route):' "Having heard what Ricoth had to say, Scarlen has decided to tell Ricoth he likes her."
:'Rozeal first (B route):' "Having heard what Rozeal had to say, Scarlen has decided to tell Rozeal he likes her."

name: How Do They Feel?
description: "Scarlen likes two girls called Rozeal and Ricoth. He wants you to find out how they feel about him."
walkthrough:
"Talk to Ricoth."
"Talk to Rozeal."
"Return to Scarlen."
uniqueComments:
: 'Reyn': ''"As a bloke, I think I know where you're coming from. When you get on with someone too well, things start changing."''
: 'Scarlen': "The same thing happened to you? But unlike me, you look like you can decide your own fate. I wish I could be like you."
: 'Reyn': ''"I just try to be honest. But sometimes you just can't manage by yourself. So rely on us. We'll do all we can to try and help you."''
Category:Alcamoth Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests
results: "You found out how they feel about him. They both seem to not dislike him."

name: I Love You No Matter What

prerequisites.label: How Do I Feel? A route completed

description: "Finally Scarlen has decided to tell Ricoth he likes her. But he doesn't want to approach her while Rozeal is near. Deliver a letter to Ricoth for him."
walkthrough:
''"Take Scarlen's letter to Ricoth."''
"Return to Scarlen."
uniqueComments:
: 'Shulk': "If you want to tell her how you feel, you should do it in person. I think that telling her in person will really make her happy."
: 'Scarlen': ''"I actually agree. But if I told her in person... What if Rozeal were to start crying? I couldn't bear to see that. I've known Rozeal all my life. It's not easy, doing this to her."''
: 'Shulk': ''"I can't decide if it's a good or bad idea. But, we've come this far. So I want to help you to the end."''
Category:Alcamoth Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests
Category:XC Mutually Exclusive Quests
results: "Ricoth read the letter from Scarlen and cried, but they are now dating."

name: Looking for a Lost Daughter
description: "When Vol'aren had his back turned, his daughter went missing. He can't leave his son unsupervised, so go and find his daughter for him."
walkthrough:
"Find Cian."
:Cian can be found on the ground floor, due east of the Fountain of Hope landmark, in some shallow water, next to a wall that is actually a ramp.
''"Return to Vol'aren."''
uniqueComments:
: 'Shulk': ''"I think it's great when kids are being kids. And I guess being a kid means getting yourself lost sometimes... But you must be happy to see your children full of life, right?"''
: Vol'aren': "Of course it makes me happy! Seeing my kids happy and active makes me happier than anything! But I'd hate for anything to happen to them, so I can't help but worry."''
results: "You found the lost child and returned her safely to her father."

name: Looking for a Lost Son
description: "Vol'aren's two children were playing outside, but now his son is nowhere to be seen. He can't leave his daughter's side, so find his son for him."
walkthrough:
"Find Atael."
: He can be found in the corner all the way east and slightly north from the Fountain of Hope between 6:00 and 18:00.
''"Return to Vol'aren."''
uniqueComments:
: 'Riki': "Riki have many littlepon, so he know how you feel! Riki understand why you so worried about it! Heropon and friends help you!"
: Vol'aren': "I admit I'd never guessed someone like you has children! But my ignorance is beside the point. Knowing I am not alone in feeling like this is a great comfort."''
results: "You found the lost child and returned him safely to his father."

name: Looking for Gold Bugs
description: "Find some bugs for a hopeful youth. For a few hours immediately after hatching, this bug will shine gold."
walkthrough:
"Collect 9 Gold Caterpillars from Tephra Cave."
"Return to Teelan."
uniqueComments:
: 'Shulk': ''"A glowing insect? The only species I know like that would be the Gold Caterpillar... Could that be what you're after?"''
: 'Teelan': ''"Yeah! That's it! A Gold Caterpillar! It inhabits the lower Bionis, but I have no idea where. I thought you might know because you're a Homs and all."''
Category:Alcamoth Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests
results: "You got the bugs he asked for and delivered them safely. He can enjoy observing them now."

name: Losing the Taste for Alcohol
description: "Nelo wants to go drinking with his friends but gets drunk too easily. Get him the ingredients for some medicine that will make him want to drink less."
walkthrough:
"Collect 2 lots of Feris Blood from Feris in Makna Forest."
"Collect 5 Pagul Hot Pots from Cruz Paguls at Eryth Sea."
"Return to Nelo."
uniqueComments:

: 'Nelo': "N-Nelo knows that! But Nelo really enjoying partying with buddies."
Category:Alcamoth Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests
results: "You collected the requested items for Nelo. Now him and his friends will have a great party!"

name: Preparing for Adventure

prerequisites.label: Kurralth registered on the Affinity Chart and spoken to

description: "Zain and his friend need water that won't freeze on their trip. But there is no waterfall nearby. Go to the other waterfalls in the world and collect some water."
walkthrough:
"Collect the Kasharpa Water."
Found behind the Kasharpa Falls on Bionis' Leg.
"Collect the Makna Water."
Found at Great Makna Falls on the western edge of the map, in the waterfall, directly west from the Divine Sanctuary landmark.
"Collect the Statue Water."
Located far northeast of the Sororal Statues landmark in Satorl Marsh.
"Return to Zain."
uniqueComments:
: 'Riki': "Waterfall? Why water no freeze? Water is water, yes? That weird!"
: 'Zain': ''"You're telling me! Truth is, I don't know either. But, it doesn't freeze so, I'm not complaining. Well, apart from about the fact that I dunno what to do about it."''
Category:Alcamoth Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests
results:
"You collected water from waterfalls and gave it to Zain. This will be enough for their trip."
clr

name: Preparing for Adventure 2
description: "Kurralth has lost a container of cream which is necessary for travelling in cold climates. He dropped it near an ether deposit at Eryth Sea."
walkthrough:
"Find the Chalk Container on Anu Shore at Eryth Sea."
"Return to Kurralth."
uniqueComments:
: 'Dunban': ''"Looks like you're in trouble. Lost something?"''
: 'Kurralth': ''"Yeah, something real important. I'm going on another adventure with Zain, yeah? And there's a really important cream we need for the journey. And guess what? I dropped it somewhere."''
: 'Dunban': ''"A cream? To be used somewhere incredibly cold? I can see why you're worried now."''
Category:Alcamoth Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests
results: ''"You found the missing item at Eryth Sea and returned it to Zain's friend, Kurralth."''

name: Preparing for Adventure 3
description: "Defeat Lakebed Orthlus at Colony 9 and obtain Orthlus' Liver. It is sure to be invaluable to Zain and Kurralth on their adventure."

Dropped by Lakebed Orthlus (Lv.40).
"Return to Zain."
uniqueComments:
: 'Reyn': ''"I don't get it. Why don't you just hunt the animals there to eat?"''
: 'Zain': ''"Sadly, that's not possible. Where we're going, there's not much in the way of edible fauna. That's why we need rations."''
Category:Alcamoth Quests
Category:XC Timed Quests
results: ''"You gave the Orthlus' Liver to Zain. Everything is ready for the adventure now!"''

name: Starlight Seeker

description: "Elior wants to learn about stars so he can become an adventurer someday. He has asked you to find Miriall, one of the most passionate astronomers in the capital."

uniqueComments:

name: Teaching Materials

They can also be obtained through overtrade with Kurralth or Jarack.
"Talk to Caul."
''"Return to Mir'leiz."''
uniqueComments:
: 'Dunban': ''"I also relied on others to help me get equipment for my training. So, if there's anything we can do, I'd like to help."''
: Mir'leiz': "Wow! Someone as old and tough as you got help from people? I guess learning to cooperate with other people is pretty important."''

Category:XC Timed Quests
results: ''"Now that Caul has all the materials he needs, he should be able to start training Mir'leiz."''

name: The Deciphering Machine
description: "A team investigating ancient ruins have found some ancient writing. However, it will take time to decipher. Collect materials to build a deciphering machine."
walkthrough:
"Collect 6 pieces of Sturdy Armour from Flavel Andos at Eryth Sea."
"Return to Ruthan."
uniqueComments:
: 'Shulk': ''"You're researching ancient ruins? Before we set out on this journey, I was doing research too. So I think I really know how you feel."''
: 'Ruthan': ''"Oh really? So you're a scientist, eh? Hahaha! Forgive me, but you really don't look like one!"''
: 'Shulk': ''"We have been travelling for a long time, and it's been tough too. Maybe I'm getting too buffed up? No, never mind that! Please tell us more about your research."''

results: "The deciphering machine is ready. Now they should be able to decipher the writing with ease."

: 'Reyn': ''"That's the spirit. She'll definitely appreciate it. Well, I know I would."''

name: Vidian Rescue Mission
description: "The transporters are broken, trapping people in Whitewing Palace. It's only a matter of time before the Telethia come. Fix the Ether Furnace Controls."
walkthrough:
"Find someone who can use the Ether Furnace Controls and ask how to fix them."
Kaleka must be spoken to in the Nopon Tower in Frontier Village, Broken Ether Furnace is triggered and must be completed first. Broken Ether Furnace won't become available until after fully completing Restoring the Capital.
"Fix the Ether Furnace Controls so that the transporters will work."
This objective is fulfilled when Broken Ether Furnace 2 is completed.
"Talk to Vidian in Whitewing Palace."
It is accessible via the transporter in the southeast of the Great Hall after fixing the Ether Furnace.
results:
"The transporters are working. You saved the people trapped in the palace."
